category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line fuzzy finder written in Go; official fzf README calls it a general-purpose command-line fuzzy finder.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fzf; official repository and documentation use fzf.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages documentation provides Getting Started; official GitHub README contains installation, usage, options, shell integration, and advanced topics.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/junegunn/fzf; per instruction, not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says command-line fuzzy finder written in Go; official README describes interactive filtering, fuzzy matching, preview, customization, and shell integrations.
